mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM kb_category
AND (project_id IS NULL OR project_id = #{projectId})
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_category (parent_id, name, icon, sort_order, project_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{projectId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kb_document WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
